summary: Verified new GalleryPreview component on Home page. All 3 expected projects render as cards with images, locations, and titles. View-all link + card click both navigate to /gallery, which still shows all 3 projects. Nav GALLERY link intact. Empty-state auto-hide verified via code review (not runtime PUT) to preserve user's live gallery data as instructed.
critical_code_review_comments: GalleryPreview.jsx correctly guards against empty items with `if (items.length === 0) return null;` (line 17) — matches requirement.
Cards use motion whileInView with viewport once:true — animations trigger on scroll as expected.
Both view-all link and each card link go to /gallery (no per-project deep link exists yet — acceptable since /gallery is a single scrollable page).
seed_data_creation: none - user's existing 3 gallery items preserved as-is
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home page renders GalleryPreview after AtelierShowcase. Testids: home-gallery-preview, home-gallery-view-all, home-gallery-card-0/1/2. Live gallery has 3 items: Luxury Crystal Chandelier (Nagpur), Heritage Amber Glass Chandelier (Hyderabad), Ruby Red Crystal Chandelier (Nagpur). Do not delete these — user-critical. Empty-state guard exists in code but was not exercised at runtime to avoid data risk.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature addition working as intended. User's 'projects not visible' concern is resolved: 3 projects now appear on Home page as a preview grid in addition to the /gallery page.
